productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Jawpaw II Black Shoe
description: Designed with a sporty look, these adidas Jawpaw II leisure shoes are perfect for water-sporting activities. With a specially designed upper and midsole to maximize water drainage, it’s a great buy for the monsoon as well. Or simply flaunt them when at the pool. Since this is a slim Fit, you may want order a size up. Upper Breathable and quick drying mesh upper Strategically placed overlays for added shoe structure, and with perforations to enhance ventilation and drain away any excess water Pull tabs at the tongue and heel for easy wear and removal Patented adidas 3-Stripes along the forefoot for better support and to exude the brand’s belief in performance Midsole Specially designed midsole with a mesh for easy water drainage Perforated footbed to ensure dry comfort Outsole Grippy rubber outsole to ensure superior stability on wet surfaces Multi-directional lugs and grooves for absolute grip and traction on various surfaces Pores with wire mesh allow water from the midsole to drain away easily Shoe care Wipe dust with a damp, clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
